problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: The key to What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? is Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI — specifically Default mode network — which would help 200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
